title: keylime security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7.12.1-11.3]
- Registrar allows identity takeover via duplicate UUID registration
  Resolves: RHEL-130760

[7.12.1-11.2]
- Properly fix the malformed certificate workaround
  Resolves: RHEL-111244
full_text:
[7.12.1-11.3]
- Registrar allows identity takeover via duplicate UUID registration
  Resolves: RHEL-130760

[7.12.1-11.2]
- Properly fix the malformed certificate workaround
  Resolves: RHEL-111244

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23210.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-13609.html
